Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings And Ntc Of Lodgment Of Non-California Authority
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Hope Anne Case, DLA Piper US LLP, 650-833-2376 for Defendant and moving party: Glass, Lewis & Co. LLC
Patrick R. Kitchin, Esq., Kitchin Legal, 415-677-9058, for for Plaintiff and opposing party: Michael Spalding, also in attendance

Argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GLASS LEWIS & CO., LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings. GRANTED, this action is stayed pending completion of arbitration. See Garcia v. Direct TV, Inc. (2004) 115 Cal. App. 4th 297. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
